skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The low temperature, in degrees Fahrenheit (°F), in a town was recorded for each of 5 days. The data are shown below.

Day12345
Low temperature (°F)6465646364

Over this 5-day period, which of the following is NOT equal to 64°F?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The range is the difference between the maximum (65°F) and minimum (63°F) values, which is 65 − 63 = 2°F, not 64°F.

Choice B is incorrect. The mean is (64+65+64+63+64) ÷ 5 = 320 ÷ 5 = 64°F.

Choice C is incorrect. Ordered: 63, 64, 64, 64, 65; the median is 64°F.

Choice D is incorrect. The value 64°F occurs three times, more than any other, so the mode is 64°F.
